name: Haulage Trip Dispatch
html:
{{ _('Trip Sheet') }} — {{ doc.name }}

{{ _('Status') }}: {{ doc.trip_status }}

{{ _('Route') }}: {{ doc.shipping_route or '' }}

{{ _('Truck') }}: {{ doc.truck or '' }}

{{ _('Driver') }}: {{ doc.driver or '' }}

{{ _('Departure') }}: {% if doc.departure_date %}{{ frappe.utils.format_datetime(doc.departure_date) }}{% else %}-{% endif %}

{{ _('Shipments') }}

{% for r in doc.shipments %}{% endfor %}
{{ _('Shipping Request') }}
{{ r.shipping_request }}

{{ _('Execution events') }}

{% for ev in doc.trip_events %}{% endfor %}
{{ _('Event') }}{{ _('Time') }}
{{ ev.event_type }}{% if ev.event_datetime %}{{ frappe.utils.format_datetime(ev.event_datetime) }}{% endif %}

{{ _('Expenses') }}

{% for e in doc.trip_expenses %}{% endfor %}
{{ _('Type') }}{{ _('Amount') }}{{ _('Date') }}
{{ e.expense_type }}{{ e.amount }}{{ e.expense_date }}
{% if doc.operational_notes %}

{{ _('Notes') }}: {{ doc.operational_notes }}

{% endif %}
